dct_title_s: New York City NYPD Stop, Question and Frisk Data, 2008
dct_description_sm: New York City NYPD Stop, Question and Frisk Data, 2008 is a point theme representing individuals from the NYPD "Stop, Question, and Frisk" database from 2008. This dataset was derived from NYPD provided tables downloaded from the web site at: https://www.nyc.gov/site/nypd/stats/reports-analysis/stopfrisk.page in August 2023. Each record represents a variety of characteristics about the person detained and the circumstances of the stop. Columbia Libraries staff extracted each half year's records and converted them to geopackage format by state plane x/y coordinates. Some records may lack geolocation information, and they have coordinates 0,0. Columbia Libraries staff has provided the data in the geopackage format, and a codebook and a has been included in the download package.
